title: immersion freezing to parcel

body:
I have only one more module to update - the ice nucleation. Then I will:

1. Delete the big struct
2. Refactor the `CommonTypes.jl` and basically move it to the `parameters` folder, and cleanup the logic between different types. I just didn't want to change too much in one PR

Closing https://github.com/CliMA/CloudMicrophysics.jl/issues/260
title: Update aersol activation to new parameters
